name: Lowen
description:
A journeyman knight who serves House Pherae and has yet to be decorated. He carries a large bag of rations with him wherever he goes. Appears in Fire Emblem: The Blazing Blade.

This is Lowen, a journeyman knight who serves Pherae! He might not have been decorated yet, but he is a very promising recruit, and what’s more, he’s great at cooking!

Lowen joined the knights because of his admiration for Harken, a knight of Pherae who once saved his village when he was a child. As a new recruit, he was trained by Marcus.

If there’s one thing that Lowen fears, it’s an empty stomach. That’s why he always makes sure to carry emergency rations, and you’ll often see him handing out food to people.

Of course, Lowen is serious about his career as a knight. And so he rides out to battle eager to prove himself, a bag of rations in hand!

Full Art By: Nishiki Areku (西木あれく)
creator: Denki_The_Thunder_King27
